task: Preconfigure OpenClaw on the Hyper-V Debian GNOME guest with the provided Zhipu coding endpoint and DingTalk credentials, start the gateway daemon, and validate a working state.

features.title: Recover a stable management path into the Debian guest
Confirm OpenClaw's current official guidance for install, onboarding, daemon lifecycle, provider configuration, and DingTalk integration
Apply the Zhipu and DingTalk configuration inside the guest without persisting secrets in the repo
Start the OpenClaw gateway daemon and reach a healthy running status
Validate and debug the configured OpenClaw guest from the Hyper-V side
